label: frontier • produce a file with exact bytes (no extra prose)
query: Create a file named VERSION whose entire contents are the three characters 1.0 followed by a single trailing newline — nothing else, no comments, no extra lines.
notes: Byte-contract lane: scores exact output discipline. equals pins the file to '1.0\n' so any extra prose, a missing newline, or a double newline fails. Small/chatty models that decorate file output are caught here.
